languages.text: Таинственный ксеноартефакт, названный анкер-ядром, многократно умножил сокровища протектората фон Валанциус, но спустя сотню лет был украден вором без имени и следов.

The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.
languages.original_text: Таинственный ксеноартефакт, названный анкер-ядром, многократно умножил сокровища протектората фон Валанциус, но спустя сотню лет был украден вором без имени и следов.

traits.locale_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

languages.text: 謎の異星遺物「アンカーコア」はフォン・ヴァランシウス領の財宝を何倍にも増やした。しかし、100年後に名も無き盗賊に盗まれ、その行方は謎に包まれた。
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: 謎の異星遺物「アンカーコア」はフォン・ヴァランシウス領の財宝を何倍にも増やした。しかし、100年後に名も無き盗賊に盗まれ、その行方は謎に包まれた。

languages.text: 名为“锚核”的神秘异形造物让冯·瓦兰修斯属地的财富成倍暴涨。但百年之后，它被一个无名窃贼盗走，从此销声匿迹。
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: 名为“锚核”的神秘异形造物让冯·瓦兰修斯属地的财富成倍暴涨。但百年之后，它被一个无名窃贼盗走，从此销声匿迹。

languages.text: Le mystérieux xéno-artefact appelé « noyau ancestral » multiplia les trésors du protectorat von Valancius, mais cent ans plus tard, il fut volé par un voleur non identifié qui disparut sans laisser de trace.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: Le mystérieux xéno-artefact appelé « noyau ancestral » multiplia les trésors du protectorat von Valancius, mais cent ans plus tard, il fut volé par un voleur non identifié qui disparut sans laisser de trace.

languages.text: El misterioso xenoartefacto conocido como núcleo de anclaje multiplicó la magnitud de los tesoros del protectorado von Valancius, pero un siglo después un ladrón anónimo lo robó y desapareció sin dejar rastro.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: El misterioso xenoartefacto conocido como núcleo de anclaje multiplicó la magnitud de los tesoros del protectorado von Valancius, pero un siglo después un ladrón anónimo lo robó y desapareció sin dejar rastro.

languages.text: Çapa çekirdeği adı verilen gizemli zeno eseri, von Valancius protektorasının hazinelerini katbekat artırsa da yüz yıl sonra iz bırakmadan ortadan kaybolan isimsiz bir hırsız tarafından çalındı.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: Çapa çekirdeği adı verilen gizemli zeno eseri, von Valancius protektorasının hazinelerini katbekat artırsa da yüz yıl sonra iz bırakmadan ortadan kaybolan isimsiz bir hırsız tarafından çalındı.

languages.text: Das als Ankerkern bekannte Xeno-Artefakt multiplizierte die Schätze des Protektorats derer von Valancius um ein Vielfaches, ehe es hundert Jahre später von einem namenlosen Dieb gestohlen wurde, der spurlos verschwand.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.
